description_long: This is an adult male figure with a medium build, dressed in a buttoned, long-sleeve shirt and fitted trousers. The shirt is tucked in and features a collar and visible buttons, while the trousers are held up by a belt with a metallic buckle. The figure's shoes are formal and closed-toe, complementing the overall smart-casual appearance. The hands are relaxed and slightly open, and the arms hang naturally at the sides. The hairstyle is short and neatly groomed, with a clean, professional look. The facial features are well-defined, and the figure stands upright, exuding a composed and approachable demeanor.
description: A smartly dressed adult male figure in a buttoned shirt, trousers, and formal shoes, standing upright with a neat short hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the buttoned shirt, belt, facial features, and relaxed hand posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the shirt's fit, and the straight leg of the trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, belt, and trousers, as well as the back of the head and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg alignment.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve buttoned shirt and fitted trousers with a belt, formal style
